prompt:
Use case: identity-preserve
Asset type: runtime unit sprite for a tactics game
Primary request: remake the Myrmidons Hunter as a single full-body transparent-background sprite that preserves the hunter identity from reference image 1 and the approved Myrmidon faction rendering language from reference image 2
Subject: an amphibious gunfighter with a fish-like head crest, lean athletic build, dual pistols, dark field trousers, and a brown-black chest strap with brass rounds
Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D game sprite, moody post-apocalyptic tactics art
Composition/framing: centered full-body grounded combat stance, tight bounds, readable when rendered around 100 px tall on the battlefield
Lighting/mood: restrained directional lighting, strong silhouette, no interior glow haze
Color palette: sea-green skin, muted red-orange fin crest, charcoal trousers, brass strap details, restrained teal accents
Constraints: transparent background; exactly one subject; preserve the dual-pistol silhouette and the hunter head shape; the entire character body must be fully opaque and solid; alpha only outside the outer silhouette; no transparent holes, no semi-transparent torso, no see-through limbs, no missing anatomy, no fog, no radial vignette, no floor, no scenery, no text
Avoid: extra characters, extra weapons, bulky armor, anime rendering, glossy 3D, halo glow, cropped feet, merged hands, malformed pistols
